items.title: If You Cannot Explain the Water, You Cannot Build the Data Center
items.content_html: Water has become the defining issue in the data center debate. Not because it is misunderstood, but because it is experienced locally, immediately and, in many cases, under stress. Communities do not need to be convinced that data centers use water. They want to know how much, from where, and at what cost to everything […]
